name.description: Name of the catalog collection source repository (e.g.: nkp-partner-catalog).

tag.description: Tag of the catalog collection source repository (e.g.: 2.16).

applications.description: List of applications in the catalog collection.

annotations.description:
Annotations maintains a map of keys and values that will be populated on the resulting
OCIRepository object's .status.artifact.metadata
Values must adhere to https://github.com/opencontainers/image-spec/blob/v1.1.1/annotations.md specification

description: CatalogCollection stores metadata of a collection of catalog applications.
